items.caption: A person holding a large balloon with a parachute attached to it, set against a backdrop of a cloudy sky. the balloon is labeled "weather balloon" and the parachute is labeled "parachute." the text in the image provides information about meteorologists using weather balloons to collect weather data, including temperature, atmospheric pressure, humidity, wind speed, and direction. the balloon is also described as being burst and the radiosonde will parachute back to earth.
